description: A firm receives a settlement check on behalf of a client, which must be deposited into the client's trust account.

nodes.task_description: Receive the settlement check and identify the correct client matter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the check and the correct client ID.

nodes.task_description: Record the deposit into the specific client's ledger within the trust accounting system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly records the deposit, ensuring it is not commingled with firm funds.

nodes.task_description: Notify the client that the funds have been received and are being held in trust.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal notification to the client.
